name: io.github.wmarceau/trainerize
description: ABC Trainerize personal training tools: client management, workout programs, nutrition coaching, messaging, scheduling, and analytics.

environmentVariables.name: TRAINERIZE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: ABC Trainerize API base URL (default: https://api.trainerize.com)

environmentVariables.name: TRAINERIZE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID for Trainerize API

environmentVariables.name: TRAINERIZE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret for Trainerize API
